criteriaResults.evidence: loadTeam(config,'example') -> namespace 'example', shape 'ts', providers.chat 'openai'. grep confirms NO 'example' code branch in non-test src; registry.ts:40 resolves all ids uniformly.
index.ts:221-224 registers --team mirroring --run-id; run.ts threads teamId:options.team. Tests: team->objectContaining({teamId:'example'}); no flag->undefined; runId+team both propagate.
chat.ts:31 loadTeam(config,team); :45 memoryNamespace||undefined -> ChatSession. Tests: example->'example' ns; no team->'' collapses to default; unknown throws.
Real temp dirs: appendLesson(...,'example') visible to 'example' loader, NOT default; memoryDir(...,'example') matches /memory[/\\]example$/; bidirectional isolation.

docs/teams.md (223 lines): three-axes table, config shape, CLI usage, programming default, deferred .bober/teams/*.json registry, 'data not code' guide. README Teams section + teams/defaultTeam in config reference.

summary: Final sprint passes all 8 required criteria. Example team is pure config data (no code branch for 'example' anywhere in production src); --team is additive (absent = programming unchanged); lesson routing isolates the example namespace; docs comprehensive. No nonGoal creep (no medical team, no file registry, no semantic_facts, no second production team). 1977 tests green.
